extra.reason: Resolved §3.5 Cursor turn-complete ambiguity: mtime-debounce approach with 3s threshold and last-record role:assistant check. TUI write path source-verified from cursor-agent@2026.02.13-41ac335. Docs updated in both design plan (§3.5) and provider-cli-reference (§5.3 with edge cases, version note, and sample fragment). Live-runtime sanity-check tracked as tmux-untethered-58q (informs, does not block 44v).

Implementation complete. Code review found two minor concurrency issues (non-pure swap! body, finally dissoc race); both fixed in replication.clj. Dynamic-watch-for-new-Cursor-dirs limitation filed as follow-up tmux-untethered-kt6.

Per-session prompt lock removed; session_locked message removed. Compaction-only lock (compaction-locks) retained to guard the one-shot claude --compact CLI path. Kill-window handshake synthesizes aborted turn_complete before compacting so iOS unlocks. AC #1 asserted in test-prompt-never-sends-session-locked. Contract test guards all four removed symbols. 528 tests, 3071 assertions, only the 2 pre-existing baseline failures.

Implemented compaction-lock check in prompt handler; rejects resume prompts during in-progress compaction with error+session_id. Tests in server_test.clj. Follow-ups filed: tmux-untethered-22g (residual TOCTOU), tmux-untethered-3eh (orchestrator path).

Deleted dead code: invoke-provider-async, run-provider-process, active-provider-processes, kill-copilot-session, kill-provider-session, find-newest-copilot-session, get-copilot-sessions-before, invoke-copilot (+ async), invoke-cursor-async, invoke-opencode-async, parse-opencode-ndjson, build-cli-command (multimethod + all dispatches), claude-cli-env-path, kill-claude-session, active-claude-processes. Simplified claude/run-process-with-file-redirection to drop session-id tracking. Removed orphaned tests (~35 in providers_test.clj, 4 in claude_test.clj). Grep for deleted symbols returns zero matches. providers-test + claude-test: 74 tests / 440 assertions / 0 failures. Full suite: 490 tests / 2821 assertions / 2 pre-existing failures unrelated to this change (same failures present in baseline before cleanup). Not committing yet — code review follows.
Fix shipped in 5a2e3d16; verified end-to-end with two old/large sessions
Closed without implementation — can be reopened if work resumes
